item.title: python
item.description: ## virtual environments check what version of Python: which python create your environment, type conda create -n <yourenvironmentname> python=3.7 anaconda (or miniconda) see a list of all of your conda environments conda info -e activate your Conda environments conda activate <yourenvironme...
